title: Video Generation
subtitle: Start from an idea, script, or novel — plan artifacts and render a finished video.

list.recentSubtitle: Continue storyboarding, rendering, or revisit a finished film.

empty.title: Your first film starts above
empty.desc: Describe a scene or story and Flowy will create an editable storyboard first.

create.title: New video session
create.hint: Choose a workflow. It cannot be changed after creation.
create.heroTitle: Turn one idea into a complete film
create.heroSubtitle: Create an editable storyboard first, then render after the story and visuals feel right.
create.modelRequired: A planning model is required before generating a storyboard.

composer.ideaPlaceholder: Describe the story, mood, or product visuals you want to see…
composer.scriptPlaceholder: Paste a script and Flowy will turn it into editable shots…
composer.novelPlaceholder: Paste a novel excerpt and Flowy will shape the story into shots…

examples.product: Create a 30-second launch film for a minimal coffee machine
examples.story: The last train arrives at an empty station on a rainy night
examples.brand: Tell a day in the life of a running shoe with cinematic shots

idea2video.title: Idea to Video
idea2video.desc: Start from an idea and plan a video automatically.

script2video.title: Script to Video
script2video.desc: Break down a full script into shots and render.

novel2video.title: Novel to Video
novel2video.desc: Extract a storyline from novel text and generate video.

actions.deleteConfirm: Delete this session? All artifacts will be removed.

workspace.progressIdle: Not started yet. Progress appears after you submit a plan.
workspace.artifactsEmpty: Artifacts will appear here after planning.

source.title: Source input
source.durationHint: Each shot clip is at least 5 seconds; planning uses this to control shot count.
source.styleHint: Portraits are a single three-view sheet with gently softened but sharp faces. Planning also builds global environment and prop plates.

models.title: Models (LLM for planning; image/video for render)
models.llmRequired: Please select a planning model (LLM) first
models.mediaRequired: Please select image and video models first
models.noProviders: Configure a platform in Model Hub first

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.selectHint: Select a file on the left to preview
artifacts.gallery: Keyframe / clip quick preview (click to open above)

revise.title: Revise artifact
revise.required: Please fill in the target path and instruction

progress.title: Progress
progress.stale: No progress update for over 90 seconds. If the upstream failed, cancel and resume from checkpoint; successful clips will not be billed again.

failure.llmCameraTreeHint: The model returned a parent/child count that does not match cameras. Auto-repair is supported; restart the backend and resume. Switch planning model if it still fails.
failure.llmChannelRenderHint: This is not a video-model failure. Storyboard/reference selection during render also needs a chat model. Switch the planning model (LLM) and resume.
failure.llmChannelPlanHint: This is not a video-model failure. Flowy upstream reports all channels for the selected chat model are unavailable. Switch the planning model (LLM) and start planning or resume.
failure.llmRenderHint: Chat model failed during render (e.g. storyboard prompts, reference selection). Artifacts were kept — switch model or resume later.
failure.llmPlanHint: Chat model failed during text planning. Switch the planning model, or resume later.
failure.imageChannelHint: Image channels were unavailable while generating portraits/keyframes. Switch the image model and resume.
failure.imageHint: Check that the image model is available. Artifacts were kept — you can resume from checkpoint.
failure.videoChannelHint: Video channels were unavailable while generating shot clips. Switch the video model and resume.
failure.videoHint: Check that the video model is available. Artifacts were kept — you can resume from checkpoint.
failure.unknownHint: Artifacts were kept. If the error mentions All channel models failed, switch the related model and resume from checkpoint.

studio.briefHint: This creates an editable storyboard before any expensive rendering starts.
studio.filmReadyHint: Review playback or download it for publishing.
studio.reviseHint: Describe the outcome directly. No technical file paths needed.
studio.revisePlaceholder: For example: make it more tense with a fast push-in and heavier rain
studio.renderHint: Rendering creates keyframes, shot videos, and assembles the final film.

storyboard.title: Storyboard
storyboard.hint: Review the story and visuals shot by shot, then render when it feels right.
storyboard.preparingHint: Shots will appear here in story order when planning is complete.
storyboard.visualPending: The visual will appear here when it is generated.
